since_last: 53% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.46%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 53% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +0.77% · Gold -0.08% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 53% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.46%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.46%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.58%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +5.92%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +5.92%, BABA +5.13%, TER +4.04%, SMR +3.89%, MDB +3.53%. Laggards: ORCL -3.68%, DELL -3.37%, TLN -3.32%, SPCX -3.03%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.03% at $120.24
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.03% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
